use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages requiring visual impact
Decorative animated accent for creative portfolios or agency sites
Ambient visual for media streaming or entertainment platforms
Loading or transition animation alternative for modern web apps
Full-screen visual backdrop for product launches or events
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered shader animation component that renders a dynamic, continuously evolving procedural visualization using Three.js. Features custom GLSL shaders with UV distortion, slow scene rotation, and layered sine wave patterns creating mesmerizing concentric ring effects. The component is self-contained with automated animation timing and responsive canvas sizing, making it ideal for hero sections, decorative backgrounds, or ambient visual accents on modern web applications.
